column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting by window with a book" | TEXT="読書の時間" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Turning page gently" | TEXT="ふむふむ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking amazed by the story" | TEXT="えっ！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Crying softly at a sad scene" | TEXT="泣ける…" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tears with handkerchief" | TEXT="ぐすっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding book to chest warmly" | TEXT="いいお話" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Closing book with satisfaction" | TEXT="読み終わった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up at the sun smiling" | TEXT="ポカポカ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching happily" | TEXT="清々しい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering deeply with book" | TEXT="難しいなぁ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head confused" | TEXT="どういうこと？" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at dictionary/phone" | TEXT="調べてみる" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding with understanding" | TEXT="なるほど！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="スッキリ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud" | TEXT="賢くなった" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a book playfully" | TEXT="貸してあげよっか" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Winking happily" | TEXT="おすすめだよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently" | TEXT="素晴らしい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy, words blurring" | TEXT="文字が…" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully behind book" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing tired eyes" | TEXT="しょぼしょぼ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Laying head on open book" | TEXT="ちょっとだけ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping peacefully" | TEXT="スヤァ…" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up startled" | TEXT="はっ！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking embarrassed" | TEXT="寝ちゃってた" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing awkwardly" | TEXT="あはは…" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out" | TEXT="てへぺろ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sipping tea while reading" | TEXT="至福の時" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking out to the garden" | TEXT="いい天気" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping to watch a butterfly" | TEXT="蝶々だ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly at nature" | TEXT="春だなぁ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly at an interruption" | TEXT="どうしたの？" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Putting a beautiful bookmark" | TEXT="しおり" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Closing book elegantly" | TEXT="後で読む" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Offering full attention" | TEXT="なぁに？" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding encouragingly" | TEXT="うんうん"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking deeply moved" | TEXT="感銘を受けました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Hand on chest sincerely" | TEXT="胸に響く" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing deeply with emotion" | TEXT="はぁ…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking determined" | TEXT="私も頑張らなきゃ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Doing a small fist pump" | TEXT="やるぞ！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up confidently" | TEXT="一歩前へ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="ありがとうございました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling warmly at camera" | TEXT="良い一日を" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye gently" | TEXT="また明日ね"
